ops.body: P1 CLOSED. Third and final commit 4a6403c3 (CI green): sweep generations — only a complete, filter-honest run supersedes. Six adversarial review rounds (3 sol, 3 fable after the codex lane went unreachable) drove the design from 'diff prior vs new' to: generation cutting gated on completeness AND filter-honesty; run-start pins (NO_GENERATION marker) + global payload watermark; conjunctive scope entries; demonstrated-airports replacing registry expansion (proven divergent both directions); coverage-based partial; include_filtered on raw paths (final major, both reviewers converged, fixed hands-on at main level with a wire-level pin). Every accepted counterexample is a regression test — 907 pytest at close, up from 805 at P1's first commit. Rejected (recorded): the ingest complete=True default nit — three explicit production call sites, 60+ cache-only test calls, a conditional-requirement sentinel would be scar tissue. Doc captured: 'Sweep generation semantics: when to cut vs refresh'. P2b (leg-intent cutover) dispatching.
